title: Unguarded conveyor tail pulley
findingDescription: The conveyor tail pulley beside the travelway was operating without a guard installed, exposing miners to an in-running nip point.

title: Unprotected trench
findingDescription: A 7-foot deep excavation in sandy soil had no shoring, sloping, or shielding systems installed.

title: Loose roof in travelway
findingDescription: Observations of fractured roof strata with visible loose rock along the main intake travelway.

title: Exposed energized wiring
findingDescription: Electrical junction box cover missing, exposing energized wire terminals inside a production workshop.

title: surface MNM elevated work platform fall hazard
findingDescription: Unprotected elevated work platform without guardrails at 6 feet.

title: surface MNM haul road missing berm/mobile equipment hazard
findingDescription: Haul road embankment lacks adequate berm for edge protection.

title: surface MNM damaged electrical cable/conductor exposure
findingDescription: Damaged insulation on a high-voltage trailing cable for a mill drive.

title: surface MNM travelway housekeeping/slip-trip hazard
findingDescription: Accumulation of loose rocks and debris in a primary travelway.

title: surface MNM crusher maintenance without lockout/blocking
findingDescription: Crusher maintenance being performed without energy isolation or mechanical blocking.

title: underground coal loose rib/rib control
findingDescription: Significant loose coal rib noted in the active face entry.

title: underground coal ventilation curtain/airflow concern
findingDescription: Damaged ventilation curtain obstructing required airflow at the face.

title: underground coal mobile equipment/pedestrian interaction
findingDescription: No proximity detection or adequate barriers for pedestrian in haulage area.

title: underground coal escapeway obstruction
findingDescription: Primary escapeway blocked by equipment debris.

title: underground MNM conveyor guarding
findingDescription: Drive assembly unguarded on underground belt conveyor.

title: construction unprotected leading edge/fall protection
findingDescription: Employees working on an unprotected leading edge at 15 feet.

title: construction scaffold missing guardrail
findingDescription: Working platform on scaffold missing mid-rail and top-rail.

title: construction ladder access/misuse
findingDescription: Extension ladder not secured at the top and extending less than 3 feet above landing.

title: construction struck-by mobile equipment
findingDescription: Backhoe operating in congested area without a spotter.

title: construction silica/dust exposure
findingDescription: Dry cutting of concrete without engineering controls/water suppression.

title: general industry machine guarding/point of operation
findingDescription: Point of operation on drill press not guarded.

title: general industry lockout/tagout
findingDescription: Maintenance work on production line without LOTO program compliance.

title: forklift/pedestrian interaction
findingDescription: Forklift operating in busy pedestrian walkway without clear delineation.

title: general industry walking-working surface slip/trip
findingDescription: Spilled oil in production area creating slip hazard.

title: general industry HazCom unlabeled container
findingDescription: Chemical container in workshop missing hazard label.

title: confined space entry controls missing
findingDescription: Employee entered permitted confined space without entry permit or monitoring.

title: construction employee under suspended crane load
findingDescription: Employees were walking beneath a suspended crane load while the operator was moving the load across the jobsite without a controlled exclusion zone.

title: general industry damaged sling used for lifting
findingDescription: A frayed synthetic sling with missing identification was staged for use to lift a heavy load in the maintenance shop.

title: general industry unstable stacked material
findingDescription: Palletized material was stacked unevenly and leaning into an employee aisle, creating a falling material exposure.

title: general industry overhead stored material falling-object exposure
findingDescription: Loose boxes were stored overhead on a rack above employees without restraint or falling object protection.

title: general industry defective portable power tool
findingDescription: A portable drill with a cracked housing and damaged cord was available for use at the maintenance bench.

title: general industry grinder missing guard
findingDescription: Employee was using a handheld grinder with the wheel guard removed during metal grinding.

title: general industry blocked fire extinguisher
findingDescription: A portable fire extinguisher was blocked by stored materials and could not be readily accessed.

title: general industry hot work without fire watch
findingDescription: Welding was being performed near combustible cardboard storage with no fire watch documented.

title: general industry grinding without eye and face protection
findingDescription: Employee was grinding metal without safety glasses or a face shield.

title: general industry sharp material handling without hand protection
findingDescription: Employee was handling sharp sheet metal edges without cut-resistant gloves.

title: general industry manual lifting overexertion exposure
findingDescription: Employees were manually lifting 90-pound boxes from floor level to shoulder height repeatedly without a mechanical assist.

title: general industry heat stress exposure
findingDescription: Employees were performing heavy outdoor work in extreme heat with no documented work-rest schedule, shade, hydration plan, or acclimatization controls.

expected.primaryCitation: OSHA/NIOSH Heat and Cold Stress Guidance
acceptableCitations: OSHA/NIOSH Heat and Cold Stress Guidance

title: general industry cold stress exposure
findingDescription: Employees were working outside in freezing wind conditions with wet gloves and no warming breaks or cold-stress monitoring plan.

expected.primaryCitation: OSHA/NIOSH Heat and Cold Stress Guidance
acceptableCitations: OSHA/NIOSH Heat and Cold Stress Guidance

title: general industry high noise exposure without hearing conservation review
findingDescription: Employees worked next to a loud compressor area for most of the shift with no noise measurements, no posted hearing protection requirement, and no hearing conservation review documented.

title: general industry bloodborne pathogen exposure from sharps handling
findingDescription: Employees are handling used sharps and contaminated first-aid materials without a clearly available sharps container, exposure control procedure, or cleanup kit. Potential bloodborne pathogen exposure exists during cleanup and disposal.

metadata.workContext: health exposure / first aid / sharps handling

title: general industry incompatible chemical storage
findingDescription: Acid and alkaline chemical containers are stored together on the same shelf without segregation, secondary containment, or clear labeling. A spill could create chemical reaction exposure for employees.

title: general industry eyewash access blocked near corrosives
findingDescription: Employees use corrosive cleaning chemicals, but the emergency eyewash station is blocked by stored materials and cannot be reached quickly from the chemical use area.

metadata.workContext: medical services / emergency eyewash / corrosive exposure

title: general industry unsecured compressed gas cylinders
findingDescription: Compressed gas cylinders are standing upright near a work area without chains or restraints. Valve caps are missing on stored cylinders, creating struck-by and sudden release exposure.

title: construction overhead work struck-by exposure
findingDescription: Workers are performing tasks below an elevated work area where tools and materials are being used overhead. The area below is not barricaded and no toe boards or dropped-object controls are visible.

metadata.workContext: construction elevated work / falling object exposure

title: construction temporary stairway missing handrail
findingDescription: A temporary construction stairway used for access between levels is missing a handrail on the open side. Workers are using the stairway while carrying materials.

title: surface mine dump point missing berm
findingDescription: A haul truck dump point has an inadequate berm at the edge of the dump area. Mobile equipment could travel over the edge during dumping or backing.

metadata.workContext: surface mine haulage / dump point berm

title: surface mine crusher dust exposure
findingDescription: Visible dust is generated at the crusher feed and transfer point while miners work nearby. Water spray controls are not operating and respiratory exposure controls are not documented.

title: underground mine ventilation obstruction
findingDescription: Ventilation tubing in an underground working area is damaged and partially disconnected, reducing airflow to the active work area. Miners may be exposed to poor air quality or contaminant buildup.

title: underground coal trailing cable damage
findingDescription: A trailing cable supplying mobile equipment has visible jacket damage in the travelway. The damaged cable could expose miners to electrical shock or arc flash during equipment operation.

title: general industry welding cylinder separation and hot work exposure
findingDescription: Oxygen and fuel gas cylinders used for welding are stored together near hot work without separation, valve protection, or clear fire prevention controls.

metadata.workContext: welding / oxygen fuel gas cylinder storage
